title: Consular Services | Immigration Services | BAL Immigration Law
content:
BAL offers complete, end-to-end consular services for U.S. and global processes.

## Expert support and service
Our dedicated consular services team has decades of experience operating in hundreds of countries. We leverage a robust network of government liaisons for quick and efficient filings around the globe.
- Tailored service for your employees

### Tailored service for your employees
- Assistance with U.S. and global visas and travel documents

### Assistance with U.S. and global visas and travel documents
- Support from former Department of State employees to strategize complex issues

### Support from former Department of State employees to strategize complex issues

## Consular services team

#### Diane Holcombe-Geddens
Immigration Manager, U.S. Consular Program

## U.S. consular services
We assist with every aspect of visa processing at U.S. embassies and consulates abroad to ensure your employees arrive in the U.S. expeditiously.
- End-to-end visa services, including drafting documents and securing appointments
- Support for both employees and dependents
- Interview guidance and expedited appointment assistance
- Close partnership with our legal teams and seamless case management experience

## Global consular services
Our global consular specialists are experts in visas and travel documents to connect your employees to the rest of the world. We assist with an array of non-U.S. travel processes, leveraging a network of global relationships.
- Consular visa process assistance for business visas, entry visas and employment visas
- Document services, including Apostille, legalization, notarization and translation
- Passport services for first-time issues, renewals and replacements

## Talk to an immigration attorney for dedicated consular support.
